mapper.sql: id, datasource_name, datasource_type, description, jdbc_url, username, `password`, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO df_datasource ( datasource_name, datasource_type, description, jdbc_url, username, `password`, status, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{datasourceName}, #{datasourceType}, #{description}, #{jdbcUrl}, #{username}, #{password}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE df_datasource SET datasource_name = #{datasourceName}, datasource_type = #{datasourceType}, description = #{description}, jdbc_url = #{jdbcUrl}, username = #{username}, `password` = #{password}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM df_datasource WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
